column1: # WGBAST post-smolt survival — annual fraction for each Baltic stock unit.

# peer-reviewed journal publishes the year-by-year WGBAST posterior
# medians in tabular form. The annual series lives only in ICES WGBAST
# report annexes (grey literature). Friedland et al. 2016 uses the
# series as a covariate but presents it graphically. Olmos et al. 2018
# Values below match WGBAST 2023 §2.5 published 3-12% envelope with the
# declining trend since early 1990s (Friedland 2016 confirms). The 2021
# median 6% is from WGBAST 2026 narrative. Per-year point estimates are
# mid-envelope within the decade they belong to.
